recommendations.title: Long, multi-responsibility function (exceeds 50 lines)
recommendations.description: runSetup() orchestrates many distinct steps (auth, file copy, health checks, shell updates, manifest save) and is ~140 lines. Extract sub-steps into smaller functions for single responsibility.

recommendations.title: Long, multi-responsibility function (exceeds 50 lines)
recommendations.description: runUninstall() performs several independent teardown steps and is ~60 lines. Consider extracting removal steps into dedicated functions.

recommendations.title: Long function (exceeds 50 lines) for CLI wiring
recommendations.description: main() handles option parsing, validation, and dispatch in ~70+ lines. Consider extracting subcommands/handlers for clarity.

recommendations.title: Duplicated logic for removing old manifest files
recommendations.description: Similar unlink/removal logic appears in src/lib/file-ops.ts:93-108. Consider centralizing this behavior in a shared utility to reduce duplication.

recommendations.title: No direct unit tests for CLI orchestrator
recommendations.description: While steps/libs are well-tested, the top-level CLI flow lacks tests (e.g., argument parsing, verify/uninstall dispatch). Consider adding minimal CLI integration tests.
